question:
Dumpuses are dull. Dumpuses are numpuses. Numpuses are blue. Numpuses are wumpuses. Wumpuses are hot. Wumpuses are vumpuses. Vumpuses are luminous. Each vumpus is a jompus. Jompuses are mean. Jompuses are impuses. Every impus is not small. Every impus is a rompus. Rompuses are not feisty. Yumpuses are not mean. Every rompus is a zumpus. Rex is a dumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Rex is mean.
